assertions.text: Manifest has required top-level fields (topic, last_run, run_mode, files, playbook_sections)
Every file entry has a 'reason' field
Every file entry has a 'contribution_type' field (iter 2)
All verdicts are kept | partial | archived | quarantined
All contribution_types are one of: canonical_source | supporting_signal | partial_extract | superseded_duplicate | low_signal | ambiguous (iter 2)
At least one file was archived
Playbook ≤8 KB, OR playbook_size_justification is non-null (iter 2 size guard)
Playbook has no inline source citations
Playbook uses operator-first scaffolding (at least 3 **Rule:** markers) (iter 2)
